name: Codex ChatGPT-login mode
summary: Route Codex ChatGPT-login WebSocket traffic through DAM.

commands.label: Start DAM for Codex ChatGPT-login mode

notes: Codex keeps its normal ChatGPT login and session flow; DAM captures configured chatgpt.com traffic through Network Extension routing.

The MVP WebSocket adapter protects unfragmented client text frames, logs warning events for fragmented/binary client frames that pass without mutation, and currently passes server-to-client frames through without local reference resolution.
Explicit proxy env fallback is retained for source builds and unsupported environments, but Network Extension capture is the primary path for ChatGPT-login traffic.
